summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P3 Economic Context Strip feature. Backend macro-context endpoint and frontend MacroContext component working perfectly with all 5 indicators, auto-refresh, and no regression to existing P0/P1/P2 features.
passed_tests: P3 Backend: GET /api/data/macro-context returns all 5 indicators correctly
P3 Backend: Fed Funds Rate (4.50%) from FRED with proper structure
P3 Backend: AUD/USD (0.6523) from Yahoo Finance with proper structure
P3 Backend: Iron Ore fallback to $97.50/t with delayed status working
P3 Backend: RBA Cash Rate hardcoded to 4.10% as required
P3 Backend: ASX 200 (8267.30) with change percentage (0.42%) from Yahoo Finance
P3 Frontend: MacroContext renders at top (fixed position, 36px height)
P3 Frontend: All 5 indicators display with proper labels and values
P3 Frontend: Thin dividers (4) between indicators present
P3 Frontend: ASX 200 shows change percentage with trend icon (green up arrow)
P3 Frontend: Iron Ore delayed status badge displays correctly
P3 Frontend: Auto-refresh interval set to 5 minutes (300000ms)
P3 Frontend: Component positioned above header with 36px spacing
P3 Frontend: Responsive design works (flex-wrap on mobile breakpoint)
P3 Integration: No regression to P0 (Heatmap), P1 (History), P2 (Arc)
P3 Layout: Perfect spacing with no content overlap
Backend: All existing endpoints (ACLED, ASX prices, Port Hedland) still working
Frontend: All layout sections visible and properly positioned

success_percentage.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed including new P3 macro-context)
